caption: A woman with dark hair and black-rimmed glasses stands against a plain, dark gray background. She is wearing a light green, patterned tunic with floral embroidery along the neckline and a dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. In each frame, she is centered and speaking, with her mouth moving and her facial expressions shifting slightly as she talks. A small, circular logo containing the text "NPTEL" is visible in the lower-left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the camera angle remains static, focusing on the woman from the chest up, as she continues her presentation with subtle movements of her head and lips.
